The [[Menstar Motors]] '''22 Patrol Scooter''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle used for low-speed, but high-visibility patrols in urban environments. They were not designed for high-speed pursuit, but were fast enough to catch criminals or suspects on foot.<ref name="GG7" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-01-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]''
